---
title: "Asymptotics-Visualization"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
devtools::load_all(".")
library(TargetedLearning)

# true contrast is 2.49 for this DGP
true_diff <- 2.49

one_rep <- function(n, fold_V = 2) {
  W  <- rnorm(n)
  L1 <- 0.5 * W + rnorm(n)
  A1 <- 0.6 * W + 0.8 * L1 + rnorm(n)
  L2 <- 0.4 * W + 0.7 * A1 + 0.6 * L1 + rnorm(n)
  A2 <- 0.3 * W + 0.5 * L2 + rnorm(n)
  Y  <- 1 + 0.5 * W + 0.4 * L1 + 0.3 * L2 + 1.2 * A1 + 0.8 * A2 + rnorm(n)

  df <- data.frame(W = W, L1 = L1, A1 = A1, L2 = L2, A2 = A2, Y = Y)

  ds <- LMTPData$new(
    data = df,
    A_cols = c("A1", "A2"),
    L_cols = list("L1", "L2"),
    W_cols = "W",
    Y_col = "Y"
  )

  fold_id <- sample(rep(seq_len(fold_V), length.out = ds$n))

  policy_seq <- repeat_policy_over_time(
    mtp_additive_shift(delta = 1),
    tau = ds$tau()
  )

  identity_seq <- identity_policy(
    A_type = "continuous",
    tau = ds$tau()
  )

  nf_shift <- LMTPNuisanceFactory$new(
    learners_g = nadir::lnr_glm_density,
    policy_seq = policy_seq,
    A_type = "continuous",
    g_mode = "density",
    cross_fit = FALSE,
    V = fold_V,
    fold_id = fold_id
  )

  nf_identity <- LMTPNuisanceFactory$new(
    learners_g = nadir::lnr_glm_density,
    policy_seq = identity_seq,
    A_type = "continuous",
    g_mode = "density",
    cross_fit = FALSE,
    V = fold_V,
    fold_id = fold_id
  )

  fluct <- LMTPFluctuationSubmodel$new(
    family = stats::gaussian(),
    use_intercept = FALSE
  )

  fit_shift <- make_lmtp_tl_task(
    ds = ds,
    policy_seq = policy_seq,
    nuisance_factory = nf_shift,
    fluctuation = fluct,
    learners_Q = stats::glm
  )$run()

  fit_identity <- make_lmtp_tl_task(
    ds = ds,
    policy_seq = identity_seq,
    nuisance_factory = nf_identity,
    fluctuation = fluct,
    learners_Q = stats::glm
  )$run()

  fit_diff <- lmtp_delta_contrast(
    fit1 = fit_shift,
    fit0 = fit_identity,
    transform = "difference"
  )

  c(
    estimate = fit_diff$estimate,
    se = fit_diff$se,
    covered = as.numeric(
      fit_diff$ci["lower"] <= true_diff && true_diff <= fit_diff$ci["upper"]
    )
  )
}

run_grid <- function(n, B = 100, fold_V = 2) {
  out <- replicate(B, one_rep(n = n, fold_V = fold_V))
  out <- as.data.frame(t(out))

  data.frame(
    n = n,
    B = B,
    mc_mean = mean(out$estimate),
    bias = mean(out$estimate) - true_diff,
    empirical_sd = stats::sd(out$estimate),
    mean_estimated_se = mean(out$se),
    coverage_95 = mean(out$covered)
  )
}

set.seed(2026)

sim_summary <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(c(500, 1000, 2000, 4000), run_grid, B = 100, fold_V = 2)
)

sim_summary
```






### 




```{r}
n <- 5000

W  <- rnorm(n)
  L1 <- 0.5 * W + rnorm(n)
  A1 <- 0.6 * W + 0.8 * L1 + rnorm(n)
  L2 <- 0.4 * W + 0.7 * A1 + 0.6 * L1 + rnorm(n)
  A2 <- 0.3 * W + 0.5 * L2 + rnorm(n)
  Y  <- 1 + 0.5 * W + 0.4 * L1 + 0.3 * L2 + 1.2 * A1 + 0.8 * A2 + rnorm(n)

  df <- data.frame(W = W, L1 = L1, A1 = A1, L2 = L2, A2 = A2, Y = Y)

  ds <- LMTPData$new(
    data = df,
    A_cols = c("A1", "A2"),
    L_cols = list("L1", "L2"),
    W_cols = "W",
    Y_col = "Y"
  )

  # fold_id <- sample(rep(seq_len(fold_V), length.out = ds$n))

  policy_seq <- repeat_policy_over_time(
    mtp_additive_shift(delta = 1),
    tau = ds$tau()
  )

  identity_seq <- identity_policy(
    A_type = "continuous",
    tau = ds$tau()
  )

nf_shift <- LMTPNuisanceFactory$new(
  learners_g = nadir::lnr_glm_density,
  policy_seq = policy_seq,
  A_type = "continuous",
  g_mode = "density",
  cross_fit = FALSE
)

nf_identity <- LMTPNuisanceFactory$new(
  learners_g = nadir::lnr_glm_density,
  policy_seq = identity_seq,
  A_type = "continuous",
  g_mode = "density",
  cross_fit = FALSE
)
  fluctuation <- LMTPFluctuationSubmodel$new(
    family = stats::gaussian(),
    use_intercept = TRUE
  )
  
fit <- run_tmle_for_LMTP(
  ds = ds,
  policy_seq = policy_seq,
  nuisance_factory = nf_shift,
  fluctuation = fluctuation,
  learners_Q = stats::glm
)

fit
```
